svg.title: Consensus Doctor v2 — full system architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing auth, patient graph, upload, AI analysis, and admin dashboard modules

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Google OAuth work in a React app?')
sendPrompt('How does Apple Sign In work?')
sendPrompt('How does email magic link auth work?')
sendPrompt('What is Supabase Auth?')
sendPrompt('What is in a patient profile in Consensus Doctor?')
sendPrompt('How does the family tree work in the medical app?')
sendPrompt('What are the roles in Consensus Doctor?')
sendPrompt('What file types does the medical upload support?')
sendPrompt('How are medical files stored in Supabase?')
sendPrompt('How does AI imaging analysis work?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI suggest follow-up tests?')
sendPrompt('How does family hereditary disease detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does multi-agent consensus work for a patient?')
sendPrompt('What tables does Consensus Doctor need in Supabase?')
sendPrompt('How is the family relationship stored in Postgres?')
sendPrompt('What is in the medical_records table?')
sendPrompt('How are AI analysis results stored?')
sendPrompt('What does the patient home dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does the family tree view work?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the upload and diagnosis flow?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin dashboard show in Consensus Doctor?')

svg.text: Click any node to ask Claude about that component
